chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّ الْخَمْرَ رَأْسُ كُلِّ إِثْمٍ وَ شَرٍّ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 17 – The wine is the starting point of every sin and evil

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/259)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/259)
text: سَأَلَهُ رَجُلٌ فَقَالَ لَهُ أَصْلَحَكَ اللَّهُ شُرْبُ الْخَمْرِ شَرٌّ أَمْ تَرْكُ الصَّلَاةِ فَقَالَ شُرْبُ الْخَمْرِ ثُمَّ قَالَ أَ وَ تَدْرِي لِمَ ذَاكَ قَالَ لَا قَالَ لِأَنَّهُ يَصِيرُ فِي حَالٍ لَا يَعْرِفُ مَعَهَا رَبَّهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Ismail Bin Bashaar,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘A man asked him<sup>asws</sup>, so he said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘May Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Keep you<sup>asws</sup> well! Is the wine drinker more evil or the neglector of the Prayer?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The wine drinker’. Then he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Or do you know why that is so?’ He said, ‘No’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Because he comes to be in such a state that he does not recognise in it, his Lord<sup>azwj</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from ’Isma‘il ibn Bashshar who has said the following: “Once a man asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying, ‘I pray to Allah to keep my soul in service for your cause, is drinking wine more evil or not performing Salat (prayer)?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘Drinking wine is more evil.’ He (the Imam) then said, ‘Do you know why?’ The man said, ‘No, I do not know.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘It is because he ends up in a condition in which he does not know his Lord.’”
